addons.name: lightning
addons.description: VLF lightning sferic detector — connects to UberSDR in iq48 mode (48 kHz IQ, centred at 25 kHz, covering 1–49 kHz), detects lightning sferics using an adaptive IIR noise floor and threshold trigger, captures GPS-timestamped waveforms for TDOA cross-correlation, and serves a live dark-themed web UI with strike activity timeline, waveform gallery, and SNR statistics.

addons.name: doppler
addons.description: Monitors ionospheric Doppler shift of standard time/frequency broadcast stations (WWV, WWVH, CHU etc.) in real time, logs minute-mean observations to CSV, and serves a live Chart.js web UI. Supports the HamSCI Doppler Experiment.

addons.name: airsplice
addons.description: Automated multi-channel audio recorder — connects to UberSDR, tunes any number of channels simultaneously, and records demodulated audio to WAV files with a live web UI for playback, management, and monitoring.

addons.name: wefax
addons.description: Automated HF weather-fax (WEFAX/radiofax) receiver — connects to UberSDR, tunes one or more HF channels simultaneously, decodes the FM-subcarrier fax signal in pure Go, and serves decoded images in a live web gallery.

addons.name: dsc
addons.description: Multi-frequency DSC (Digital Selective Calling) decoder — connects to UberSDR, simultaneously monitors up to 25 ITU-R M.541 DSC frequencies, decodes DSC messages (ITU-R M.493), and serves decoded messages in a live web UI.

addons.name: navtex
addons.description: Automated dual-frequency NAVTEX receiver — connects to UberSDR, simultaneously monitors both standard NAVTEX frequencies (518 kHz international and 490 kHz national/coastal), decodes SITOR-B/NAVTEX signals, and serves decoded messages in a live tabbed web UI.

addons.name: sstv
addons.description: Automated SSTV receiver — connects to UberSDR, tunes one or more HF channels, pipes demodulated audio through a headless build of QSSTV, and serves decoded images in a live web gallery.

addons.name: hfdl
addons.description: HFDL (High Frequency Data Link) decoder — connects to UberSDR as the radio back-end and uses dumphfdl to decode HFDL messages from aircraft, with a live statistics dashboard showing aircraft positions, ground stations, and signal data.

addons.name: packet
addons.description: AX.25 packet radio decoder — connects to UberSDR and decodes AX.25 packet frames across up to 4 channels per dial frequency, with a live web UI displaying decoded frames and station activity.

addons.name: dxcluster
addons.description: Custom DX cluster service — connects to UberSDR, aggregates DX spots from the built-in CW skimmer and external cluster feeds, and serves a live web UI with real-time spot filtering.

addons.name: loran
addons.description: Loran-C pulse-envelope viewer — connects to UberSDR, requests a raw IQ stream at 100 kHz, decodes the Loran-C pulse envelope for up to two simultaneous GRI chains, and serves a browser-based scope display with emission-delay station markers.
